# Ev Charging Cost Tariff

> Calculates EV charging session cost using location-linked tariffs (per-kWh or per-minute) with optional flat session fees and free-charging programme exemptions.

**Category:** Asset · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** ev · charging · cost · tariff · billing · geofence · vehicle

## What this does

Calculates EV charging session cost using location-linked tariffs (per-kWh or per-minute) with optional flat session fees and free-charging programme exemptions.

Specifies 6 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **location_id** *(hidden, optional)* — Charging Location (Geofence)
- **billing_type** *(select, optional)* — Billing Type
- **cost_per_unit** *(number, optional)* — Cost Per Unit
- **session_fee** *(number, optional)* — Session Fee
- **charge_energy_added_kwh** *(number, optional)* — Energy Added (kWh)
- **charge_energy_used_kwh** *(number, optional)* — Grid Energy Used (kWh)
- **duration_min** *(number, optional)* — Session Duration (minutes)
- **is_free_charging_eligible** *(boolean, optional)* — Free Charging Eligible
- **charger_network** *(text, optional)* — Charger Network
- **calculated_cost** *(number, optional)* — Calculated Cost

## What must be true

- **cost_requires_tariff:** Cost is only calculated when billing_type and cost_per_unit are both configured for the charging location; sessions without a tariff have null cost
- **per_kwh_uses_higher_value:** Per-kWh billing uses max(charge_energy_used_kwh, charge_energy_added_kwh) x cost_per_unit + session_fee — the larger value protects against under-charging due to metering differences
- **per_minute_billing:** Per-minute billing uses duration_min x cost_per_unit + session_fee
- **free_charging_exemption:** If the vehicle holds a free-charging entitlement and the session used the qualifying network, cost is set to 0.00 regardless of any configured tariff
- **session_fee_non_negative:** Session fee must be zero or positive; negative fees are rejected
- **retroactive_tariff_update:** Updating a geofence tariff retroactively recalculates the cost of all historical sessions matched to that geofence

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Cost Calculated Per Kwh** — when billing_type eq "per_kwh"; is_free_charging_eligible neq true; cost_per_unit exists, then Cost computed from energy delivered; attached to the session record.
- **Cost Calculated Per Minute** — when billing_type eq "per_minute"; is_free_charging_eligible neq true; cost_per_unit exists, then Cost computed from session duration; attached to the session record.
- **Cost Zero Free Charging** — when is_free_charging_eligible eq true; session charger_network matches the qualifying free-charging network, then Session cost set to zero under free-charging entitlement.
- **Cost Null No Tariff** — when billing_type not_exists OR cost_per_unit not_exists OR no geofence matched the charging location, then Cost left as null; session recorded without financial data.
- **Tariff Retroactively Applied** — when a location tariff has been created or updated by the operator, then Historical charging costs updated to reflect the new tariff.

**❌ Failure paths**

- **Session Fee Invalid** — when session_fee lt 0, then Tariff not saved; user informed that session fee must be non-negative. *(error: `TARIFF_INVALID_SESSION_FEE`)*

## Errors it can return

- `TARIFF_INVALID_SESSION_FEE` — Session fee must be zero or a positive value.
- `TARIFF_MISSING_COST_PER_UNIT` — A billing type is set but no cost per unit is configured.

## Events

**`charging.cost.calculated`** — Session cost calculated using a location tariff
  Payload: `session_id`, `calculated_cost`, `billing_type`, `cost_per_unit`, `session_fee`

**`charging.cost.free`** — Session cost set to zero due to free-charging programme eligibility
  Payload: `session_id`, `reason`, `charger_network`

**`charging.cost.tariff_changed`** — A location tariff was changed; historical session costs may be updated
  Payload: `location_id`, `billing_type`, `cost_per_unit`, `session_fee`

## Connects to

- **ev-charging-session** *(required)*
- **geofence-places** *(required)*
